# FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.disconnecting

**Case**

The session is disconnecting from a streaming endpoint.

## Declaration

```swift
case disconnecting
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession] briefly enters this state after you call [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/disconnect()] while it completes the disconnection.
title: FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.disconnecting
